# reto
# Descripción
Why use p and q when I can use more?
Connect with nc fickle-tempest.picoctf.net 56977.
# Solución 
## solución
```
c = 
n = 
e = 65537


# obtenido de https://www.alpertron.com.ar/ECM.HTM
tn = 

d = pow(e, -1, tn)
m = pow(c, d, n)

flag = bytes.fromhex(hex(m)[2:]).decode()

print(flag)
```
 picoCTF{too_many_fact0rs_3023548}
